MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James Millar (415-981-8100) of the Millar Law Firm for Plaintiff/ opposing party Mary Ellen Ryan.
Spencer Martinez (415-543-4800) of RMKB Lawyers for Defendant/Moving party Rebecka Kim and Ashley McRae.
Nancy E. Presant-McDonald, CSR# 9906 (818-551-7300) Court reporter.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. Argued re: wrongful eviction, 37.10 violation re: work/repairs, conflict re depo and dec. Hearing is held. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT REBECKA KIM and ASHLEY MCRAE's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively, Summary Adjudication is taken under submission.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes) Judge: Ronald E.
